Off Calendar Dec-31-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Morris Bobrow for and with Peter Levy.

Counsel explained the extent of services provided to support the requests for fees. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
